chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.49 of 2017 Muhammad Rahim Versus Customs Appellate Tribunal & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection No.18. 2. For orders on CMA 752/17 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 753/17 Dated: 14.09.2021 None present. -.-.- This Special Customs Reference Application is pending since 2017 and the counsel for applicant and/or applicant has not cared to have it fixed even once. Today the matter is somehow fixed and the applicant and his counsel have not appeared. There is no intimation either from the applicant’s side. It appears that they have lost interest in the instant reference application, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
